Journey

The Technical Engine

8 years of evolution from Frontend Developer to Technical Web Manager.

2019–Present

Senior Web Developer & Technical Manager

PT DUIT Investech

Leading the architectural design and frontend execution of enterprise-scale systems, including PT Antam's Brankas e-commerce and KTA Polri. Managed mission-critical platforms for the Indonesian Military Academies (AAU & AAL), SISTesi school management, and GLZoo ticketing. Remained hands-on in implementing secure encryption for sensitive resident data (NIK/KK), PWA features via Service Workers, and complex performance reporting for KONI DKI Jakarta.

Vue.jsLaravelSecurity ArchitecturePWA
2020–Present

Senior Web Architect (Freelance)

CREETECH

Designing and scaling web-based solutions, including a comprehensive Residential Management System (RT/RW) and industrial IoT monitoring dashboards. high-traffic event platforms with real-time QR ticketing.

IoT DashboardsE-commerceWeb PerformanceArchitecture
2021–2023

Frontend Developer (Part-time)

Poteq.com

Delivered rapid-market digital solutions for Jakarta-based clients. Specialized in streamlining workflows using Bubble.io and custom JavaScript to bridge the gap between low-code speed and full-code flexibility.

Bubble.ioJavaScriptNo-code/Low-code
2018–2019

Frontend Web Developer

Caption Hospitality

Architected hospitality-focused CMS solutions. Focused on rebuilding core management systems, optimizing data manipulation on the frontend, and enhancing UI responsiveness for better user retention.

React.jsSASSCMS Optimization
2017–2018

Frontend Web Developer

PT Nostra Solusi Teknologi

Built the foundational infrastructure for 'Cari Parkir' and 'Redkendi'. Implemented complex map-based logic using Google Maps API and real-time event handling with Firebase Push Notifications.

React.jsGoogle MapsFirebaseUI/UX

My Philosophy

The principles that drive every line of code

Zero-Ego Engineering

I believe the best solutions stem from objective analysis. I treat every code review as an optimization opportunity and every piece of feedback as vital data for collective progress.

Architectural Integrity

Scalability and maintainability are non-negotiable. I architect robust, well-documented systems designed to endure and remain relevant long after the initial release cycle.

Deployment Rigor

Quality is a byproduct of disciplined systems, not chance. I enforce rigorous automated testing and CI/CD pipelines to ensure every line of code is production-ready and battle-tested.

Adaptive Mastery

In a fast-evolving landscape, stagnation is regression. I am committed to continuous experimentation and technical evolution to ensure my solutions always leverage industry best practices.

Expertise
